name: On Time Wheelchair Trnsprtn
registry_source: KY Secretary of State (not located in public search results)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate non-emergency medical transport / NEMT). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'ON TIME WHEELCHAIR', 'ON TIME WHEELCHAIR TRANSPORTATION', and 'ON TIME' in KY returned no matches. Address 404 Camptown Rd, Bardstown, KY is near 201 Camptown Rd (Bardstown City Taxi & Transportation), suggesting a small local NEMT operator. KY SOS entity not located via public search; would require direct query of sos.ky.gov business search.

name: AAA Wheel Chair Direct
registry_source: AZ Corporation Commission (not located in public search results)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate NEMT). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'AAA WHEEL CHAIR' and 'AAA DIRECT' returned no matches. No hq/address provided in source data. Phoenix-area AAA-branded mobility entities found (AAA Mobility Specialist LLC, AAA Discount Mobility) are distinct businesses; not confirmed as the same entity. AZ Corp Commission entity not located via public search.

name: Carey Limousine
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue (not located in public search results)
notes: No USDOT for the Glassboro NJ location. Address 452 Alfred Ave, Glassboro, NJ 08028 (phone 856-881-9028) is confirmed via business directories as a Carey-branded operator, likely a local franchise/affiliate of Carey International network (parent Carey International, Inc.). The FMCSA-listed 'CAREY LIMOUSINE' (USDOT 284288) is DUNN LIVERY LP dba CAREY LIMOUSINE at 935 BRADFORD STREET, ST PAUL, MN 55114 (interstate passenger, 8 PU / 12 drivers, ACTIVE, Satisfactory 01/29/2015) — a different MSP affiliate, not the NJ entity. NJ SOS filing for Glassboro entity not located via public search.

name: R & R Limo
registry_source: MN Secretary of State (not located in public search results)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate limousine — MN limos are regulated through MnDOT's Office of Freight and Commercial Vehicle Operations, not necessarily FMCSA). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'R & R LIMO' and 'R R LIMOUSINE' returned no MN matches (results: MA, FL, IL, VA only). 'R & R' keyword search returned no MN entity. The well-known R&R Limousines (rrlimowi.com, Kurt Leverenz) is Wisconsin-based — distinct from the Hamel MN entity at 3622 Hamel Rd. MN SOS filing not located via public search.

name: Acadia Wheelchair Trnsprtn Svc
registry_source: TX Secretary of State / Comptroller (not located in public search results)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate NEMT). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'ACADIA WHEELCHAIR', 'ACADIA WHEEL CHAIR', 'ACADIA', and 'WHEELCHAIR TRANSPORTATION' returned no matches. Address 200 Rosewood Ln, Cedar Hill, TX 75104 appears in apartment listings — suggesting a residential/home-based small operator. Not confused with Acadian Ambulance (LA-based, distinct entity) or Wheelchair Accessible Transportation LLC (Tyler TX). TX SOS filing for entity not located via public search.
